Should flag

Bordered containers with too-small padding

4px padding, bordered, body-length text
This text is crammed against the border with only 4px padding. It feels claustrophobic and hard to read.
2px / 4px padding, colored background
Cramped background padding makes the body text feel jammed against the edges of the colored container.
Zero padding, bordered
Zero padding on a bordered element. The text is literally touching the border.

Should pass

Comfortable container padding

16px padding, bordered
This container has 16px padding, giving the text room to breathe within its border.
14px / 18px padding, colored background
Generous padding inside the colored container — text has plenty of room from the edge.

Small inline pills (under consideration)

6px / 14px small pill (matches .detection-cmd on impeccable.style) npx impeccable detect src/
8px / 14px small pill (clears the rule's current 8px floor) npx impeccable detect src/
